"'''Versus'''" is a [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] story in [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume 8|''Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume'' 8]].

==Plot summary==
Grandly surveying the audience of his [[Arena of Doom|arena]], [[Mondo-Mod]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] announced the contenders for the evening: one [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]], [[Luminara Unduli/Legends|Luminara Unduli]], against an assortment of beasts, with no [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] and no [[The Force/Legends|Force]]. For the first fight, Mondo-Mod unveils a [[Wampa/Legends|wampa]], who Unduli quickly dispatches by jumping up, grabbing him by his horns, and flipping him, using simple physics. Second, the Hutt announces a [[durkii]], who the Jedi defeats by darting underneath his legs and back, causing the creature to flip onto its back. Finally, quite displeased, Mondo-Mod declares the final contender: a heavily outfitted [[Droid/Legends|droid]], who is quickly disabled when Unduli flicks a rock into its visor. Winning their bet, Unduli returns to Mondo-Mod, who obliges their deal by handing her the coordinates of a [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] [[Droid/Legends|droid]] factory on [[Diorda]]. Afterwards, the Master meets with her [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], [[Barriss Offee/Legends|Barriss Offee]], who, disguised as a masked gambler, managed to win 10,000,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]], forcing the Hutt to go out of business. Their mission a total success, Unduli and Offee return to their starship.
